zh.Tunstall, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾彤絲朵
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Tunstall VI於大約1382年出生在英國藍卡爾彤絲朵時，他的父親Sir Thomas Tunstall23歲，母親Isabel Harington15歲。他於大約1414年與Lady Anne Parr結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1425年在英國藍卡爾享年44歲。

zh-hans.Tunstall, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾彤絲朵
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Tunstall VI于大约1382年出生在英国藍卡爾彤絲朵时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Tunstall23岁，母亲Isabel Harington15岁。他于大约1414年与Lady Anne Parr结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1425年在英国藍卡爾享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tunstall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire): habitational name from any of various places called with Old English tūn-stall ‘site of a farm, farmstead’, notably Tunstall (Lancashire) and one or more of many Staffordshire places (Tunstall near Stoke on Trent, Tunstall near Adbaston, and four places called Dunstall), but also Tunstall Farm in Mountfield (Sussex) and possibly also Tunstall (Durham, Kent, Norfolk, Shropshire, Suffolk, east and North Yorkshire), and Dunstall (Lincolnshire).

variants.name: Tunstill
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Tunstall  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Tunstall VI was born about 1382, in Tunstall, Lancashire, England, his father, Sir Thomas Tunstall, was 23 and his mother, Isabel Harington, was 15. He married Lady Anne Parr about 1414. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1425, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Tunstall VI est né environ 1382, à Tunstall, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Tunstall, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Isabel Harington, avait 15 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne Parr environ 1414. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1425, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Tunstall VI um 1382 in Tunstall, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Tunstall 23 und seine Mutter Isabel Harington 15. Er hat um 1414 Lady Anne Parr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1425 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Tunstall VI è nato il circa 1382 nel Tunstall, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Tunstall, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Harington, aveva 15 anni. Lui sposato Lady Anne Parr circa 1414. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1425, nel Lancashire, England, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Tunstall VIが約1382年にイギリスランカシュアイアトゥンスタルで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Tunstallは23歳，母Isabel Haringtonは15歳であった。約1414年にLady Anne Parrと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1425年にイギリスランカシュアイアで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Tunstall VI(이)가 대략 1382년 영국 랭카실르 툰스탤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Tunstall(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Harington(은)는 15세였다. 그는 대략 1414년 Lady Anne Parr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1425년 영국 랭카실르에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Tunstall, Lancashire, England: Tunstall, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Tunstall VI nasceu aproximadamente 1382, em Tunstall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Tunstall, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Harington, tinha 15 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Anne Parr aproximadamente 1414. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1425, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Tunstall VI родился около 1382 г. в местности тунсталл, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Tunstall было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Harington, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne Parr около 1414 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1425 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Tunstall VI nació aproximadamente 1382, en Tunstall, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Tunstall, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Isabel Harington, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Lady Anne Parr aproximadamente 1414. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1425, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años.
